articles.author: John Power
articles.title: OpenAI’s Sam Altman apologises over failure to report Canadian mass shooter - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Tech firm suspended mass shooter’s ChatGPT account before attacks, but did not inform law enforcement.
articles.content:
OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has apologised over his companys failure to warn authorities about the concerning online activities of a teen who went on to commit one of Canadas worst mass shootings.
Jesse V… [+2274 chars]
